statement: When working with visual output (web pages, charts, UI components), use browser/screenshot or take_screenshot tools to verify the rendered result rather than assuming correctness from code alone. Code that compiles and passes lint may still render incorrectly.

evidenceRefs.title: VS Code Agent Tools — Browser Tools

publicSummary: Use screenshot tools to visually verify rendered output — passing lint is not the same as looking correct.
cautionNotes: Browser tools are experimental and may not be available in all environments. Fall back to asking the user to verify.
